name: Colombo
tagline: Tropical Island Capital with Unbeatable Value
description: Colombo is Sri Lanka's vibrant capital, offering a blend of colonial architecture, Buddhist temples, and modern development along the Indian Ocean coast. The cost of living is remarkably low, and the city serves as a gateway to Sri Lanka's stunning beaches, hill country, and wildlife. A growing expat community and improving infrastructure make it an increasingly attractive FIRE destination.

quickFacts.visa: ETA visa on arrival (30 days); extendable to 6 months
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate – generally safe; be aware of petty crime in tourist areas

housing.description: Modern 2BR apartment in Colombo 4 (Bambalapitiya) or Colombo 6 (Wellawatte)

dining.description: Local rice and curry restaurants 4-5x/week; street food and kottu roti spots

healthcare.description: Private health insurance with access to Nawaloka and Lanka Hospitals

transportation.description: Tuk-tuks and buses for daily commute; occasional ride-hailing via PickMe

entertainment.description: Galle Face Green walks, temple visits, beach trips to Mount Lavinia, cinema

1M.lifestyle: Your dollar stretches impressively in Colombo. A comfortable apartment, daily restaurant meals of authentic Sri Lankan cuisine, and access to beautiful beaches just minutes away. The moderate English environment means you can navigate daily life without difficulty.

housing.description: Spacious 3BR apartment in Colombo 3 (Kollupitiya) or modern condo in Colombo 7

dining.description: Mix of upscale restaurants at Colombo Fort, boutique cafes, and local favorites

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance covering top Colombo hospitals and specialist care

transportation.description: Own small car or regular ride-hailing; weekend trips to Kandy and Galle

entertainment.description: Gym membership, diving trips to Hikkaduwa, cultural events, weekend getaways to hill country

2M.lifestyle: A very comfortable existence in Colombo with a modern apartment in a prime neighborhood, regular dining at the city's best restaurants, and the freedom to explore Sri Lanka's incredible diversity of landscapes on weekends. You will live better than most local professionals.

housing.description: Luxury 4BR apartment or penthouse in Colombo 3 or beachfront in Mount Lavinia

dining.description: Fine dining at Ministry of Crab, Nihonbashi, and hotel restaurants; regular entertaining

healthcare.description: International health insurance with coverage across South and Southeast Asia

transportation.description: Own car with occasional driver, ride-hailing, domestic flights to Jaffna and Trincomalee

entertainment.description: Surfing trips, luxury wellness retreats, wildlife safaris, premium gym and club memberships

3M.lifestyle: At this budget you experience the finest Colombo has to offer. A luxury apartment with ocean views, dining at the island's most celebrated restaurants, and weekend getaways to boutique hotels across Sri Lanka. You will have significant surplus to save or invest.

housing.description: Luxury villa in Colombo 7 or oceanfront property in the southern coast suburbs

dining.description: Private chef plus regular fine dining at Colombo's top restaurants and hotels

healthcare.description: VIP concierge medical with access to Singapore hospitals for major procedures

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle with driver, domestic flights, seaplane transfers

entertainment.description: Private whale watching, luxury safari lodges, yacht charters, international travel

domesticHelp.description: Full-time cook, housekeeper, gardener, and driver

luxuryExtras.description: International first-class travel, luxury hotel stays, philanthropy, art collecting

5M.lifestyle: You are living at the pinnacle of Sri Lankan luxury. A beautiful villa with full staff, a personal chef, and a chauffeur-driven car. The island's best experiences are at your fingertips, from private beach villas to exclusive wildlife encounters, with enormous surplus for global travel.

housing.description: Sprawling estate compound in Colombo 7 or beachfront villa complex on the south coast

dining.description: Personal chef team, catered events, exclusive dining experiences

healthcare.description: Elite global health plan, personal wellness team, annual executive health screening in Singapore

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, full-time chauffeur, private seaplane and helicopter charters

entertainment.description: Private island retreats, art patronage, exclusive cultural events, luxury global travel

domesticHelp.description: Full household staff: chef, butler, housekeepers, gardeners, security team, personal assistant

luxuryExtras.description: Property portfolio, yacht, first-class global travel, philanthropic foundations, tea estate investment

10M.lifestyle: At this level in Sri Lanka, your wealth is extraordinary by local standards. Multiple properties, a full staff, philanthropic endeavors, and the ability to live a truly global lifestyle with Sri Lanka as your tropical home base. Most of your budget will go unspent or into investments.
